# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20'))
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'External artifact URL (S3 presigned URL, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS, etc.)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: 'artifact.zip', description: 'Local filename to save the downloaded artifact as')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: '/opt/myapp', description: 'Remote deployment directory on production servers')
        text(name: 'PRODUCTION_SERVERS', defaultValue: 'prod1.example.com\nprod2.example.com', description: 'One production server per line')
        booleanParam(name: 'CLEAN_DEPLOY_PATH', defaultValue: true, description: 'Remove existing contents at deployment path before deploying')
        string(name: 'SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID', defaultValue: 'prod-ssh-key', description: 'Jenkins SSH credentials ID for production servers')
        booleanParam(name: 'RESTART_SERVICE', defaultValue: true, description: 'Restart service after deployment')
        string(name: 'SERVICE_NAME', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service name to restart on the target servers')
    }

    environment {
        ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH = "${WORKSPACE}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS?.trim()) {
                        error('PRODUCTION_SERVERS is required')
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        rm -f '${ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH}'
                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 0 \
                            -o '${ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH}' '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        test -s '${ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH}'
                        ls -lh '${ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def servers = params.PRODUCTION_SERVERS
                        .split('\\r?\\n')
                        .collect { it.trim() }
                        .findAll { it }

                    sshagent(credentials: [params.SSH_CREDENTIALS_ID]) {
                        servers.each { server ->
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail

                                echo "Deploying to ${server}"

                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'mkdir -p "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"'

                                if [ '${params.CLEAN_DEPLOY_PATH}' = 'true' ]; then
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' 'rm -rf "${params.DEPLOY_PATH:?}/"*"'
                                fi

                                scp -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${ARTIFACT_LOCAL_PATH}' '${server}':'${params.DEPLOY_PATH}/'

                                ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' '
                                    set -euo pipefail
                                    cd "${params.DEPLOY_PATH}"
                                    if command -v unzip >/dev/null 2>&1 && file "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}" | grep -qi "zip archive"; then
                                        unzip -o "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                                    elif command -v tar >/dev/null 2>&1 && file "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}" | grep -Eqi "tar archive|gzip compressed|bzip2 compressed|XZ compressed"; then
                                        tar -xf "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                                    fi
                                    rm -f "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                                '

                                if [ '${params.RESTART_SERVICE}' = 'true' ]; then
                                    ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${server}' '
                                        set -euo pipefail
                                        if command -v systemctl >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                                            sudo systemctl restart "${params.SERVICE_NAME}"
                                        else
                                            sudo service "${params.SERVICE_NAME}" restart
                                        fi
                                    '
                                fi
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        always {
            cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
        }
    }
}
